OCGV.commandLineArgs:
-NoProfile -NoLogo -NoExit -Command "& { Import-Module '$(TargetPath)'; Get-Process | Select-Object ProcessName, Id,
   @{Name='CPU(s)'; Expression={[math]::Round($_.CPU,2)}},
   @{Name='WorkingSet(MB)'; Expression={[math]::Round($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,2)}},
   @{Name='Private(MB)'; Expression={[math]::Round($_.PrivateMemorySize64/1MB,2)}}
    | Out-ConsoleGridView -Debug }"

OCGV -Filter.commandLineArgs:
-NoProfile -NoLogo -NoExit -Command "& { Import-Module '$(TargetPath)'; Get-Process | Select-Object ProcessName, Id,
   @{Name='CPU(s)'; Expression={[math]::Round($_.CPU,2)}},
   @{Name='WorkingSet(MB)'; Expression={[math]::Round($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,2)}},
   @{Name='Private(MB)'; Expression={[math]::Round($_.PrivateMemorySize64/1MB,2)}}
    | Out-ConsoleGridView -Debug -Filter com }"

OCGV -MinUi.commandLineArgs:
-NoProfile -NoLogo -NoExit -Command "& { Import-Module '$(TargetPath)'; Get-Process | Select-Object ProcessName, Id,
   @{Name='CPU(s)'; Expression={[math]::Round($_.CPU,2)}},
   @{Name='WorkingSet(MB)'; Expression={[math]::Round($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,2)}},
   @{Name='Private(MB)'; Expression={[math]::Round($_.PrivateMemorySize64/1MB,2)}}
    | Out-ConsoleGridView -MinUi -Filter pas }"

OCGV.commandLineArgs:
-NoProfile -NoLogo -NoExit -Command "& { Import-Module '$(TargetPath)'; Get-Process | Select-Object ProcessName, Id,
   @{Name='CPU(s)'; Expression={[math]::Round($_.CPU,2)}},
   @{Name='WorkingSet(MB)'; Expression={[math]::Round($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,2)}},
   @{Name='Private(MB)'; Expression={[math]::Round($_.PrivateMemorySize64/1MB,2)}}
    | Out-ConsoleGridView -Debug -Title "processes" }"

OCGV Slow.commandLineArgs: -NoProfile -NoLogo -NoExit -Command "& { Import-Module '$(TargetPath)'; 1..50 | ForEach-Object { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 50; [PSCustomObject]@{ Index = $_; Time = (Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss.fff'); Square = $_ * $_ } }  | Out-ConsoleGridView -Debug }"
